name: aaron-intelligence
description: Aaron James's Claude Code plugin marketplace and curated plugin list.

plugins.name: caveman-lite
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode (hooks only) — no agents, no slash commands, no skills. Safe to install alongside multi-agent orchestration layers.

plugins.name: pilotfish-agents
plugins.description: Vendored copy of Nanako0129/pilotfish's six role subagents (scout, Explore, mech-executor, executor, verifier, security-executor) plus hooks that load and reinforce the delegation policy each turn. Portable multi-model orchestration; only the settings.json fallbackModel step is manual — see plugin README.
